problem id: 3dcc0195
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  11110010 -> 11011111
  10100100 -> 10110101
  00001111 -> 01111100
  10101010 -> 11111101
  00111110 -> 11111001
  01101011 -> 11111111
  00100010 -> 10011001
  10111010 -> 11111101

query: 01110010
predicted answer: 11011011
